message:
Update issue tracker: mark CLI test tasks as in_progress

.beads/issues.jsonl:
- bd-32pp (cli: premium command tests): status changed from "open" to
  "in_progress", updated_at timestamp advanced to 2026-02-10T01:58:18.
  This task covers testing login, sync, collections, notes, save, cost,
  recommend, and premium-packs CLI commands.
- bd-3ndh (cli: utility command tests): status changed from "open" to
  "in_progress", updated_at timestamp advanced to 2026-02-10T01:58:18.
  This task covers testing help, completion, config, utilities, registry,
  update-cli, serve, metadata-assistant, and interactive CLI commands.

Both tasks are part of the ongoing CLI test coverage effort.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
